_metadata.author: UMRS Project
_metadata.scope: Advisory reference — UMRS is a reference system, not a production deployment
notes: All CUI markings share sensitivity level s1 — differentiation is by MCS category, not sensitivity.
Handling requirements are defined in the companion file US-CUI-HANDLING.json, linked via handling_group_id.
Palette colors are defined in the shared UMRS-PALETTE.json file.
Dual-status categories (those that can be Basic or Specified depending on governing authority) have two entries: CUI//ABBREV (basic) and CUI//SP-ABBREV (specified).
Index groups are NARA organizational groupings for display only — they never appear in banner markings.
Keys are the complete banner marking string in alphabetical order.
NATO and Provisional categories are excluded — they lack finalized abbreviations in the NARA registry as of 2026-03.
LDCs and Distribution Statements are tracked separately with their own MCS category numbers in the c250-c279 range.

CUI.name: Controlled Unclassified Information
CUI.description: Umbrella designation for all controlled unclassified information. In UMRS, specific category markings (CUI//ABBREVIATION) are always required for granular MCS labeling and auditability.

CUI//ADJ.name: Status Adjustment
CUI//ADJ.description: Immigration records related to adjustment of status proceedings.

CUI//ADPO.name: Administrative Proceedings
CUI//ADPO.description: Records related to administrative adjudication, dispute resolution, settlements, and issuances of orders.

CUI//AG.name: Agriculture
CUI//AG.description: Intelligence information related to agricultural security and food supply.

CUI//APP.name: Patent Applications
CUI//APP.description: Unpublished patent application records requiring controlled handling.

CUI//ARCHR.name: Archaeological Resources
CUI//ARCHR.description: Location and vulnerability information for archaeological sites and resources.

CUI//ASYL.name: Asylee
CUI//ASYL.description: Records related to asylum seekers and asylee status determinations.

CUI//BARG.name: Collective Bargaining
CUI//BARG.description: Records related to collective bargaining negotiations and agreements.

CUI//BATT.name: Battered Spouse or Child
CUI//BATT.description: Immigration records related to battered spouse or child petitions.

CUI//CMPRS.name: Committed Person
CUI//CMPRS.description: Records pertaining to individuals legally committed through judicial or law enforcement processes.

CUI//COMPT.name: Comptroller General
CUI//COMPT.description: Records related to Comptroller General audits and financial oversight activities.

CUI//CONREG.name: Entity Registration Information
CUI//CONREG.description: Proprietary information from entity registration systems.

CUI//CONV.name: Tax Convention

CUI//CRIT.name: General Critical Infrastructure Information
CUI//CRIT.description: General information related to the protection, operation, or vulnerability of critical infrastructure systems and assets.

CUI//CVI.name: Chemical-Terrorism Vulnerability Information
CUI//CVI.description: Vulnerability assessments and security plans for chemical facilities under baseline handling.

CUI//CVIC.name: Child Victim/Witness
CUI//CVIC.description: Records related to child victims and witnesses in legal proceedings.

CUI//DCNI.name: Unclassified Controlled Nuclear Information - Defense
CUI//DCNI.description: Department of Defense unclassified nuclear information under baseline handling.

CUI//DCRIT.name: DoD Critical Infrastructure Security Information

CUI//DREC.name: Death Records
CUI//DREC.description: Information contained in death records that is protected from public disclosure.

CUI//EMGT.name: Emergency Management
CUI//EMGT.description: Information related to emergency management planning, response, recovery, and coordination activities.

CUI//EXPT.name: Export Controlled
CUI//EXPT.description: Information subject to U.S. export control laws under baseline handling. Applies when the governing regulation (e.g., EAR) does not mandate controls beyond standard CUI safeguards.

CUI//EXPTR.name: Export Controlled Research
CUI//EXPTR.description: Research data that falls under export control, often arising in academic or R&D contexts.

CUI//FHFANPI.name: Federal Housing Finance Non-Public Information
CUI//FHFANPI.description: Non-public information related to Federal Housing Finance Agency oversight activities.

CUI//FINT.name: International Financial Institutions
CUI//FINT.description: Financial information related to international financial institutions and multilateral development banks.

CUI//FNC.name: General Financial Information
CUI//FNC.description: General financially sensitive information under baseline handling, including transactional and operational financial details.

CUI//FSEC.name: Bank Secrecy
CUI//FSEC.description: Bank secrecy information under baseline handling.

CUI//FSI.name: Financial Supervision Information
CUI//FSI.description: Information related to financial institution supervision and regulatory examination.

CUI//GENETIC.name: Genetic Information
CUI//GENETIC.description: Individually identifiable genetic test results and characteristics under baseline handling.

CUI//HLTH.name: Health Information
CUI//HLTH.description: Protected health information under baseline handling.

CUI//ID.name: Internal Data
CUI//ID.description: Intelligence community internal data under baseline handling.

CUI//INF.name: Informant
CUI//INF.description: Information identifying or provided by confidential informants under baseline handling.

CUI//INTEL.name: General Intelligence
CUI//INTEL.description: General intelligence support data under baseline handling.

CUI//INV.name: Investigation
CUI//INV.description: Investigative case records, evidence documentation, and operational law enforcement reporting under baseline handling.

CUI//INVENT.name: Inventions
CUI//INVENT.description: Information related to inventions requiring controlled handling prior to patent determination.

CUI//ISVI.name: Information Systems Vulnerability Information
CUI//ISVI.description: Details about weaknesses, vulnerabilities, or exploitation paths in information systems or networks.

CUI//IVIC.name: Victims of Human Trafficking

CUI//JURY.description: Federal grand jury records and proceedings under baseline handling.

CUI//JUV.name: Juvenile
CUI//JUV.description: Law enforcement records involving juveniles, protected under statutory confidentiality.

CUI//LCOMM.name: Communications
CUI//LCOMM.description: Intercepted, monitored, or retained law enforcement communications including authorized surveillance.

CUI//LEI.name: General Law Enforcement
CUI//LEI.description: General law enforcement information not covered by a more specific law enforcement category.

CUI//LMI.name: Legislative Materials
CUI//LMI.description: Non-public legislative records and supporting documents.

CUI//LNSL.name: National Security Letter
CUI//LNSL.description: Records associated with National Security Letters issued under authorized investigative authority.

CUI//LPROT.name: Protective Order
CUI//LPROT.description: Records subject to judicial protective orders under baseline handling.

CUI//LSCRN.name: Terrorist Screening
CUI//LSCRN.description: Terrorist screening datasets, watchlist correlations, and identity vetting records.

CUI//LVIC.name: Victim
CUI//LVIC.description: Records related to victims in legal proceedings.

CUI//MERG.name: Mergers
CUI//MERG.description: Financial information related to merger and acquisition activities.

CUI//MIL.name: Military Personnel Records
CUI//MIL.description: Personnel data for military members requiring safeguarding.

CUI//NETW.name: Net Worth
CUI//NETW.description: Net worth and financial disclosure information.

CUI//NNPI.name: Naval Nuclear Propulsion Information
CUI//NNPI.description: Naval nuclear propulsion information under baseline handling.

CUI//NUC.name: General Nuclear
CUI//NUC.description: General nuclear information under baseline handling.

CUI//OCCMTO.name: Ocean Common Carrier and Marine Terminal Operator Agreements
CUI//OCCMTO.description: Proprietary agreements between ocean common carriers and marine terminal operators.

CUI//OPSEC.name: Operations Security
CUI//OPSEC.description: Information whose uncontrolled exposure would undermine operational security.

CUI//PERS.name: Personnel Records
CUI//PERS.description: Federal employee personnel records under baseline handling.

CUI//PEST.name: Pesticide Producer Survey
CUI//PEST.description: Survey data from pesticide producers protected from public disclosure.

CUI//PHYS.name: Physical Security
CUI//PHYS.description: Information related to physical security measures, vulnerabilities, or protection of facilities and assets.

CUI//POST.name: Proprietary Postal
CUI//POST.description: Proprietary information related to postal service operations.

CUI//PRE.name: Presentence Report
CUI//PRE.description: Presentence investigation reports prepared for judicial sentencing.

CUI//PRIIG.name: Inspector General Protected
CUI//PRIIG.description: Personally identifiable information protected in the context of Inspector General activities under baseline handling.

CUI//PRIVILEGE.description: Information protected by attorney-client privilege or attorney work product doctrine.
CUI//PRIVILEGE.required_dissemination_control: LDC restricted to Attorney-Client (AC) and/or Attorney Work Product (AWP) only. These LDCs may only be used with this category.

CUI//PROPIN.name: General Proprietary Business Information
CUI//PROPIN.description: Proprietary business information provided to the government under baseline handling.

CUI//PRVCY.description: General personally identifiable information and privacy-protected records under baseline handling.

CUI//PSEC.name: Secrecy Orders

CUI//PSI.name: Privileged Safety Information
CUI//PSI.description: Department of Defense privileged safety information.

CUI//RAIL.name: Railroad Safety Analysis Records
CUI//RAIL.description: Information related to railroad safety analysis, inspections, or incident assessments.

CUI//RESD.name: Permanent Resident Status
CUI//RESD.description: Records related to permanent resident status and lawful permanent residency.

CUI//RTR.name: Retirement

CUI//RWRD.name: Reward
CUI//RWRD.description: Documentation related to reward programs, informant compensation, or public incentive investigative initiatives.

CUI//SAFE.name: SAFETY Act Information

CUI//SBIZ.name: Small Business Research and Technology

CUI//SERV.name: Ocean Common Carrier Service Contracts
CUI//SERV.description: Proprietary service contracts between ocean common carriers.

CUI//SP-ADPO.name: Administrative Proceedings (Specified)
CUI//SP-ADPO.description: Administrative proceedings where the governing authority mandates specific handling controls beyond baseline CUI safeguards.

CUI//SP-AIV.name: Accident Investigation (Specified)
CUI//SP-AIV.description: Accident investigation records where the governing authority mandates specific handling controls beyond baseline CUI safeguards.

CUI//SP-BUDG.name: Budget (Specified)

CUI//SP-CENS.name: US Census (Specified)

CUI//SP-CRITAN.name: Ammonium Nitrate (Specified)

CUI//SP-CTI.name: Controlled Technical Information (Specified)
CUI//SP-CTI.description: Technical information with military or space application that requires specific handling controls under defense-related regulations. Distribution Statements B through F apply as dissemination controls.
CUI//SP-CTI.required_dissemination_control: Distribution Statements B through F per DoD Instruction 5230.24

CUI//SP-CVI.name: Chemical-Terrorism Vulnerability Information (Specified)
CUI//SP-CVI.description: Chemical facility vulnerability assessments and security plans where 6 CFR 27.400 mandates specific handling controls.
CUI//SP-CVI.required_warning_statement: WARNING: This record contains Chemical-Terrorism Vulnerability Information controlled by 6 CFR 27.400. Unauthorized release may result in civil penalties or other action.

CUI//SP-DCNI.name: Unclassified Controlled Nuclear Information - Defense (Specified)
CUI//SP-DCNI.description: Department of Defense unclassified nuclear information where 10 U.S.C. 128 mandates specific handling controls.
CUI//SP-DCNI.required_warning_statement: Department of Defense Unclassified Controlled Nuclear Information. Exempt from mandatory disclosure pursuant to 5 U.S.C. 552(b)(3), as authorized by 10 U.S.C. 128.

CUI//SP-EXPT.name: Export Controlled (Specified)
CUI//SP-EXPT.description: Export-controlled information where the governing regulation (e.g., ITAR) mandates specific handling controls beyond baseline CUI safeguards.
CUI//SP-EXPT.required_warning_statement: WARNING: This document contains technical data whose export is restricted by the Arms Export Control Act (Title 22, U.S.C., Sec 2751, et seq.) or the Export Control Reform Act of 2018. Violations of these export laws are subject to severe criminal penalties.
